name_cn:
.🌷【New】Gucci Blondie Medium Tote
The new Gucci Blondie handbag features the brand's classic series logo, which first appeared in the early 1970s, cleverly combining heritage charm with contemporary style, perfectly interpreting the brand's classic design and modern essence. This medium tote is crafted from beige and dark brown Original GG canvas, featuring a detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap.
Model: 815716.
Size: 32(L) x 17(H) x 10cm(D).
Color: Brown full leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy
